description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a dark red cover, reinforced by two prominent gray chains that wrap horizontally around its upper and lower sections. The front cover features a striking black pixelated mask or skull motif, giving the book a mysterious or ominous appearance. The spine and back are plain, with the same deep red color and chain details, while the pages are visible as a solid white block from the side. The book's edges and corners are blocky, suggesting a stylized or voxel-inspired design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the chains possibly serving as both decoration and reinforcement. The book exudes a sense of secrecy or danger, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A thick, dark red book with gray chains wrapped around it and a black mask or skull motif on the front cover. The design is blocky and stylized, giving it a mysterious and reinforced appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red cover with a black mask or skull motif and two gray chains wrapping horizontally.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the white pages and the thickness of the book, with chains visible at the top and bottom edges.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain red cover with chains, lacking any motif or illustration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the red cover and the book's thickness, with chains wrapping around but no visible motif.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a bold, pixelated black mask or skull motif centered on a dark red background, framed by two horizontal gray chains. The illustration is stylized and geometric, evoking a sense of mystery or danger.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain red with gray chain details at the top and bottom, and no visible text or decorative elements.
